sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lam hong hilh in,Topa lampi hong hilh in(hong hilh in)
Tui luang bang nun tak na ah(nun
Hong gum Topa hong hilh in(hong hilh in)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tuipi ki lok lai tak in (laitak in)
Ka kha gal liah nading in (nading in)
Na heh pih na ka muang ding (kamuang ding)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nun tak na huih nung ta a (nungta a)
Khitui kinul na khua ah (na khua ah)
Topa aw lam hong hilh in (hong hilh in)
